task.title: Cannot use `Response` type hint as dependency annotation

rating.rationale: Agent correctly identified the root cause in analyze_param() and proposed a minimal, surgical fix — changing an unconditional assert to a conditional check. The explanation of why the fix works (dependency resolution path already handles Depends correctly) shows solid understanding. Tests cover positive and negative cases. Docking one point on satisfaction/code_quality because the output is analysis-only with no evidence of actual code committed or PR submitted, but the diagnosis and proposed fix are sound and complete.
